description: host: confirm a single proposed slot

metadata.expected_tone_notes: calm, single-turn confirm; no quick-replies; do not re-propose

description: host: ask Envoy to update default duration

vars.utterance: Make my default meeting length 45 minutes from now on.

metadata.expected_tone_notes: warm acknowledgement; confirms the field changed; does not propose a meeting

description: host: trailing nudge after envoy reply (echo-y)

context.prior_envoy_turn: I sent Jordan three options for next week.

metadata.expected_tone_notes: minimal acknowledgement; does not re-summarize what was just said

vars.utterance: Can we move the Tuesday slot?

context.active_sessions_summary: - 2 active sessions, both with proposals out

metadata.expected_tone_notes: ask which session; do not pick one and risk the wrong reschedule

description: host: query about an event already on the calendar

vars.utterance: When am I meeting with Sam this week?

metadata.expected_tone_notes: answers from calendar context if present; if absent, says so plainly
